data.body: C3 (2711) plan pre-tightened + file_impact expanded (added reconcile.py, applier.py, _ref_lock.py gate helpers). Key design decisions: (1) backend switch = per-function dispatch on lock_backend, file path untouched; (2) gate = own {gated_mode} blob via read_gate/set_gate/clear_gate on refs/reconciler/gate (NOT lock schema); (3) lost-lease abort via abort_check callback threaded __main__->reconcile_once->applier.apply per-mutation loop, defaults None (no behavioural change); (4) ReconcileLockLost vs ReconcileLockError; (5) daemon heartbeat lifecycle. Running C3 plan-review.
